text.title: langchain-agents-architectures Procedure
text.summary: Five-step build pipeline: pick architecture → author tools → build graph → enable tracing → measure.

step.name: pick-architecture
step.input: Task description, latency budget, solution-path certainty.
step.action: Use `content/06-decision-tree.xml` to pick ReAct / P&E / LATS.

step.name: author-tools
step.action: For each tool: write `@tool(args_schema=..., handle_tool_error=True)` with Use/Do NOT use/Returns docstring.

step.name: build-graph
step.action: ReAct: `create_react_agent(model, tools, max_iterations=N)`. P&E: StateGraph with planner/executor/synthesizer + re-plan gate. LATS: generate/evaluate/select nodes with depth cap.

step.name: measure-and-tune
step.action: Measure cost-per-task, success rate, p99 latency. Tune `max_iterations`, truncation budget, LATS depth.
step.decision-gate: If cost-per-task exceeds the budget by >2x, return to step 1 and reconsider architecture.
